summary: Global Scale Foundation & Advanced Checkout Logic - All features working correctly. 19/19 backend tests passed. Frontend checkout page correctly shows: Store Pickup Required alert for bakery-only carts, Split Fulfilment Order alert for mixed carts, Pan-India toggle that switches city input from dropdown to free text, and correct pickup location selection with FREE pickup label.
seed_data_creation: Products already migrated with fulfilment_type field - 128 bakery products set to 'store_pickup', 264 other products set to 'shipping'

details: GET /api/settings/public returns pickup_cities array (Mumbai, Gurugram, Bangalore)
Returns store_locations with full addresses
Returns pan_india_shipping boolean (true)
Returns bakery_pickup_only_categories (cakes, fresh_treats)
GET /api/admin/settings requires auth (401 without)
Returns full settings with id, pickup_cities, pan_india_shipping, default_fulfilment_type, store_locations, updated_at
PUT /api/admin/settings updates settings successfully
POST /api/admin/products/migrate-fulfilment-defaults requires auth
Migration endpoint works and returns bakery_products_updated and other_products_updated counts
Shows 'Store Pickup Required' alert with amber background
Displays all 3 pickup locations (Mumbai, Gurugram, Bangalore) with full addresses
Shows 'Store Pickup: FREE! 🎉' in order summary
Pet name is pre-filled from product modal
'Required for Cake' badge shown on Pet Details section
Pan-India Shipping toggle visible for shippable items
Toggle switches city input from dropdown to free text input
Custom city can be entered (tested with 'Chennai')
Home Delivery and Store Pickup options available
Shows 'Split Fulfilment Order' alert with blue background
Displays which items go to 'Store Pickup (Bakery)' vs 'Home Delivery / Shipping'
'Bakery Items Pickup Location' section with all 3 store locations
'Delivery Address (For Shippable Items)' section with Pan-India toggle
Order summary shows both items with correct pricing
Shipping fee (₹150) shown for shippable items
POST /api/orders with store_pickup fulfilmentType works
POST /api/orders with pan_india_shipping fulfilmentType works
POST /api/orders with split fulfilmentType and splitFulfilment object works

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/settings/public: PASS - Returns pickup_cities, store_locations, pan_india_shipping, bakery_pickup_only_categories
api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/admin/settings: PASS - Returns full settings with auth
api_endpoints_verified.POST /api/orders: PASS - Creates orders with fulfilmentType field

frontend_ui_verified.free_pickup_label: PASS - 'Store Pickup: FREE! 🎉' in order summary
frontend_ui_verified.pan_india_toggle: PASS - Toggle visible, switches city input type
frontend_ui_verified.split_fulfilment_sections: PASS - Separate sections for bakery pickup and delivery

context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Scale Foundation features fully functional. Checkout page at /checkout correctly handles: 1) Bakery-only carts with store pickup requirement, 2) Shippable-only carts with Pan-India toggle, 3) Mixed carts with split fulfillment. Test file at /app/tests/test_global_scale_fulfilment.py covers all settings and order APIs. Products have been migrated with fulfilment_type field.
